title: SEO Fundamentals
description: Master the art of ranking on Google. Learn how search engines work, how to perform keyword research, and how to optimize your website both on-page and off-page to drive massive organic traffic.

seo_metadata.title: SEO Fundamentals Certificate Course | ProCerix
seo_metadata.description: Learn Search Engine Optimization. Master keyword research, on-page SEO, technical SEO, and link building.

learning_outcomes: Understand how search engine crawlers index and rank web pages
Conduct effective keyword research using modern SEO tools
Optimize on-page elements (Title tags, Meta descriptions, Headers)
Understand the basics of Technical SEO (site speed, mobile-friendliness)
Develop a sustainable off-page SEO and link-building strategy

lessons.title: Crawling, Indexing, and Ranking
lessons.content:
The Three Steps

Google uses 'spiders' to Crawl the web, stores what it finds in an Index, and uses complex algorithms to Rank those pages when a user searches for a query.

lessons.title: Search Intent
lessons.content:
What Does the User Want?

Search intent is the 'why' behind a search query. Is the user looking for information (Informational), trying to find a specific website (Navigational), or looking to buy something (Transactional)?

modules.title: Keyword Research and On-Page SEO
modules.description: Targeting the right terms and optimizing your content.

lessons.title: Keyword Research
lessons.content:
Finding the Gold

Use tools to find keywords with high search volume and low competition. Focus on 'long-tail keywords' (phrases with 3+ words) which are highly specific and easier to rank for.

lessons.title: On-Page Optimization
lessons.content:
Telling Google What You Do

Place your target keyword in the Title tag, Meta description, H1 header, and naturally throughout the content. Ensure your URL structure is clean and descriptive.

modules.title: Technical and Off-Page SEO
modules.description: Building a healthy site and gaining authority.

lessons.title: Technical SEO Basics
lessons.content:
Site Health

Your site must load quickly, be mobile-friendly (responsive), and use an SSL certificate (HTTPS) to be favored by Google. Submit an XML sitemap to help crawlers find your pages.

lessons.title: Off-Page SEO (Link Building)
lessons.content:
Gaining Authority

Off-page SEO is primarily about backlinks (other websites linking to yours). Google views backlinks as 'votes of confidence'. The higher the quality of the linking site, the more authority passes to you.

mcqs.question: What are the three primary functions of a search engine?

options.content: Selling, Advertising, Displaying
Crawling, Indexing, Ranking
Reading, Writing, Deleting
Hosting, Domain mapping, Security

mcqs.question: If a user searches for 'buy Nike running shoes size 10', what type of search intent is this?

options.content: Informational
Navigational
Transactional
Accidental
A keyword that is very old
A single word with massive search volume
A highly specific phrase consisting of 3 or more words, usually with lower competition
A keyword that appears at the bottom of a webpage

mcqs.question: Which of the following is a crucial On-Page SEO factor?

options.content: How many followers you have on Twitter
Including the target keyword in the Title Tag
Buying a billboard advertisement
The color of your website's background

mcqs.question: What is the purpose of a Meta Description?

options.content: It is a direct ranking factor for Google's algorithm
It provides a brief summary of the page in search results to entice users to click
It hides the text from search engines
It determines the font size of the webpage

mcqs.question: Which of the following falls under 'Technical SEO'?

options.content: Writing a blog post about industry trends
Asking another website for a backlink
Ensuring the website loads quickly and is mobile-friendly
Setting up a Facebook page

mcqs.question: In Off-Page SEO, what is considered a 'vote of confidence' from another website?

options.content: A backlink
A 'Like' on social media
A positive customer review on Yelp
An email sent to your support team

mcqs.question: Are all backlinks valued equally by Google?

options.content: Yes, 100 links from spam sites are better than 1 link from a university
No, links from high-authority, relevant websites pass much more value
Google ignores all backlinks
Only links from within your own country count
A map showing the physical address of your business
A file that lists all important pages on your site to help search engines crawl it
A visual design wireframe of your website
A list of your competitors' keywords

mcqs.question: What does HTTPS indicate to a search engine?

options.content: That the site is very fast
That the site has an SSL certificate and encrypts data securely
That the site is an e-commerce store
That the site is built with HTML5
